name: Zscaler
description: This app implements containment and investigative actions on Zscaler

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Fetch sandbox report for provided md5 file hash

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: The md5 file hash

parameters.name: get_ids_and_names_only
parameters.description: Whether to retrieve only a list containing URL category IDs and names. Even if displayURL is set to true, URLs will not be returned

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: A list of IPs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Add to this category

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A list of URLs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Add to this category

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: A list of IPs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Remove from this category

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A list of URLs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Remove from this category

actions.name: Allow Ip
actions.description: Add an IP address to the allowlist

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: A list of IPs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Add to this category

actions.name: Allow Url
actions.description: Add a URL to the allowed list

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A list of URLs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Add to this category

actions.name: Unallow Ip
actions.description: Remove an IP address from the allowlist

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: A list of IPs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Remove from this category

actions.name: Unallow Url
actions.description: Remove a URL from the allowed list

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A list of URLs

parameters.name: url_category
parameters.description: Remove from this category

actions.name: Lookup Ip
actions.description: Lookup the categories related to an IP

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: A list of IPs

actions.name: Lookup Url
actions.description: Lookup the categories related to a URL

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: A list of URLs

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file to Zscaler Sandbox

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of file to submit

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Submit file to sandbox even if found malicious during AV scan and a verdict already exists

actions.name: Get Admin Users
actions.description: Get a list of admin users

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to fetch

actions.name: Get Users
actions.description: Gets a list of all users and allows user filtering by name, department, or group

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: User Name/ID

parameters.name: dept
parameters.description: User department

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: User group

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to fetch

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: The search string used to match against a group's name or comments attributes

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to fetch

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: ZScaler User ID

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ZScaler Group ID

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: ZScaler User Id

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ZScaler Group Id

actions.name: Get Allowlist
actions.description: Get urls on the allow list

actions.name: Get Denylist
actions.description: Get urls on the deny list

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter results be url or ip

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Regular expression to match url or ip against

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: ZScaler User Id

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: JSON object containing the user details (see https://help.zscaler.com/zia/user-management#/users/{userId}-put)

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category to add the specified URLs to

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of URLs to add to the specified category

parameters.name: retaining-parent-category-url
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of URLs to add to the retaining parent category section inside the specified category

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category to add the specified URLs to

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IP addresses to add to the specified category

parameters.name: retaining-parent-category-ip
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IPs to add to the retaining parent category section inside the specified category

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category to add the specified URLs to

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of URLs to remove from the specified category

parameters.name: retaining-parent-category-url
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of URLs to remove from the retaining parent category section inside the specified category

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category to add the specified URLs to

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IP addresses to add to the specified category

parameters.name: retaining-parent-category-ip
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IPs to add to the retaining parent category section inside the specified category

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Destination IP group name

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Destination IP group type (i.e., the group can contain destination IP addresses, countries, URL categories or FQDNs)

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: Comma seperated string of destination IP addresses, FQDNs, or wildcard FQDNs added to the group

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Additional information about the destination IP group.

parameters.name: ip_categories
parameters.description: Destination IP address URL categories

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Destination IP address countries. You can identify destinations based on the location of a server.

parameters.name: ip_group_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of unique identifiers for the IP destination groups

parameters.name: exclude_type
parameters.description: The IP group type to be excluded from the results

parameters.name: category_type
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of IP group types to be filtered from results. This argument is only supported when the 'lite' argument is set to True

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit of the results to be retrieved

parameters.name: lite
parameters.description: Whether to retrieve only limited information of IP destination groups. Includes ID, name and type of the IP destination groups

parameters.name: ip_group_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the IP destination group

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Destination IP group name

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: Comma seperated string of destination IP addresses, FQDNs, or wildcard FQDNs added to the group

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Additional information about the destination IP group.

parameters.name: ip_categories
parameters.description: Destination IP address URL categories

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Destination IP address countries. You can identify destinations based on the location of a server.

parameters.name: is_non_editable
parameters.description: If set to true, the destination IP address group is non-editable. This field is applicable only to predefined IP address groups, which cannot be modified

parameters.name: ip_group_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of unique identifiers for the IP destination groups

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by department name

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specifies the page offset

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Specifies the page size

actions.name: Get Category Details
actions.description: Get the urls and keywords of a category

parameters.name: category_ids
parameters.description: Comma seperated string of category id's to query
